news.title: OpenAI and Anthropic are kicking off a mad cybersecurity dash
news.description: Mythos and GPT-5.5 add to cybersecurity worries that OpenAI and Anthropic had already sparked with AI coding's popularity.

news.title: I pay for Gemini, ChatGPT, and Claude — and there’s a clear winner
news.description: I pay for ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude. After spending time with all three, I keep coming back to only one of them.

news.title: 'Why wake up in the morning?': Jensen Huang calls out US push to ban AI Chip exports to China, calls it “completely ridiculous”
news.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang calls a total ban on AI chip exports to China 'ridiculous'. He believes such restrictions would push China to build its own technology, ultimately harming US leadership. Huang argues American companies should compete globally. He sugge…

news.title: Anthropic to brief global financial watchdog on cyber flaws exposed by Mythos, FT reports
news.description: Claude chatbot-maker will discuss its new Mythos Preview AI model with finance ministries and central banks from the FSB, following a request from Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey

news.title: Nvidia earnings in focus: Can the AI rally continue?
news.description: Nvidia has become the biggest symbol of the global artificial intelligence boom. Investors across the world are closely watching its quarterly earnings to understand whether AI-driven demand can continue at the current pace. The company’s results are expected…

news.title: OpenAI is hiring workers to reduce 'friction' in communities where it's building data centers
news.description: OpenAI says it will pay someone up to $236,000 plus equity to help reduce tensions in communities where they are developing Stargate data centers.

news.title: Using Claude AI to Scale Your Small Business Workflows and Output
news.description: Claude AI has emerged as a compelling option for small businesses seeking to streamline operations and tackle administrative challenges. In a recent overview by The AI Advantage, the focus is on how Claude AI combines advanced technologies like natural langua…

news.title: TI says safety will decide 800V AI data center adoption and supplier wins
news.description: Pradeep S. Shenoy, a computing technology expert at Texas Instruments's (TI) US headquarters, recently shared his views on 800V architectures for AI data centers in a media appearance. He said 800V solutions will not see broad adoption in AI data centers in 2…

news.title: Why the former Google executive who backed OpenAI and Anthropic wants to get people off their screens
news.description: After 15 years as a Google product executive helping build the tools that define our digital lives, Horowitz now wants to focus on "tech-enabled well-being."

news.title: Salesforce to spend $300 million on Anthropic tokens in 2026: CEO Marc Benioff
news.description: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff revealed the company anticipates spending nearly $300 million on Anthropic tokens by 2026, primarily for AI-powered software development and coding assistance. Benioff emphasised that AI tools enhance engineer productivity and effi…

news.title: India must aim higher: cost optimization must not define the country’s tryst with artificial intelligence
news.description: Indian firms have scant incentive to invest in foundational research for artificial intelligence (AI). But the cost of not doing so may be even higher. Indian firms should look beyond quarterly profit-and-loss statements for a longer-term view.

news.title: Why the Restricted Claude Mythos Model Just Appeared in Google Cloud
news.description: The sudden inclusion of Anthropic’s Claude Mythos model in the Google Cloud console has sparked significant interest and debate within the tech community. Known for its ability to detect code vulnerabilities with remarkable precision, Claude Mythos was previo…

news.title: Trending ChatGPT Image Prompts: India crosses 1 billion AI-generated photos in under a month
news.description: India is the top market for ChatGPT Images 2.0. Users have created over one billion images, making it a global trend. Popular uses include anime selfies, animated avatars, and cinematic edits. These AI-generated visuals are appearing on social media and datin…

news.title: AI, not engineers for coding: Salesforce to spend $300 million on Anthropic tokens, CEO Marc Benioff says
news.description: Benioff's plans, coupled with his previous announcement that Salesforce will not hire any more engineers in 2025 due to productivity gains from AI, signal a decisive shift — the automation of writing code.

news.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman face off in OpenAI lawsuit trial
news.description:
The trial's outcome could redefine nonprofit commitments in tech, impacting AI industry structures and investor confidence in mission-driven ventures.
The post Elon Musk and Sam Altman face off in OpenAI lawsuit trial appeared first on Crypto Briefing.
